text.content:
Sensory System
(Delta ingest, durable cursor,
chunking & embedding)

LTM Handler
(claim-aware search,
ACL, context bundle)

Generation Stack
(prompt reconstruction,
model eval gate, fast/slow
routing, structured output)

Memory Graph DB
(Entity-Claim-Note-Episode
snapshot + delta, public
boundary projection)

Canonical State DB (SQLite)
(active claims, open loops,
interaction policy, relation state,
encrypted boundary payload)
